person_name: Gordian II, Roman Emperor (r. 238, co-emperor with Gordian I)
person_name_full: Gordian II, Roman Emperor (r. 238, co-emperor with Gordian I)
notes: Roman emperor in 238 CE, co-ruled with his father Gordian I during the Year of the Six Emperors.

docs.title: Life of Gordiani Tres
docs.author: Historia Augusta (anonymous)
docs.excerpt: He was very kind of heart; indeed, when any of the boys was flogged at school, he could not restrain his tears. 2 Serenus Sammonicus,⁠ 71 a great friend of his father's, was his tutor, and a very beloved and agreeable one he was; in fact, when he died, he left the young
